session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of all changes:
**PR #9146: Rename config [plans] section to [github] with backwards compatibility** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9146
### Changes made:
1. **`src/erk/cli/config.py`** — `_parse_config_file()` now reads `[github]` section first, falling back to `[plans]` for backwards compat. Renamed local var `plans_repo` → `github_repo`. Updated comment in `merge_configs_with_local`.
2. **`src/erk/cli/commands/config.py`** — `config list` displays `github.repo=...` instead of `plans.repo=...`. `config set` match case changed from `["plans", "repo"]` → `["github", "repo"]`. Added `config get github.repo` handler.
3. **`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/config/schema.py`** — Updated `cli_key` from `"plans.repo"` to `"github.repo"` in `RepoConfigSchema`.
4. **`tests/unit/cli/test_project_config.py`** — Added `test_loads_github_repo`, `test_github_section_takes_precedence_over_plans`, and `test_loads_full_config_with_github_repo`. Existing `[plans]` tests preserved for backwards compat coverage.
5. **`tests/commands/setup/test_config.py`** — Renamed `test_config_set_local_plans_repo` → `test_config_set_local_github_repo`, updated to use `github.repo` key.
**CI**: 6,000+ unit tests pass, ruff/ty clean.
